summary: The diff implements most of the required fixes for the 'Loading profile' hang. REQ-14 (App.tsx timeout guard), REQ-15 (useQueries.ts explicit staleTime/retry/timeout), and REQ-16 (backend getUserProfile typed error) appear to be addressed. REQ-17 (ProfileSetup guard against re-showing for users with existing profiles) is partially addressed via App.tsx routing logic but the ProfileSetup component itself lacks an internal redirect guard. One notable concern: the backend main.mo diff is truncated so full verification of REQ-16 is limited.

missing_requirements.requirement: In frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx, ensure that if the user already has a profile on the backend, the ProfileSetup component is not rendered and the user is redirected to the Dashboard. Add a guard in App.tsx so the routing logic does not incorrectly send a user with an existing profile to ProfileSetup.
missing_requirements.reason: The ProfileSetup.tsx diff shows no internal guard or redirect logic that checks whether the user already has a profile before rendering. The component simply renders the form unconditionally when mounted. While App.tsx may have routing guards mentioned in file-summaries.txt, the explicit guard inside ProfileSetup.tsx as required is absent from the component file.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added that transforms OldUserProfile to NewUserProfileWithRole by adding a default 'user' role field.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention adding a migration module or changing profile data models. The non-goals explicitly state adding new backend data models unrelated to profile loading should be avoided. The migration.mo file itself was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A useResilientActor hook was added as a new actor creation abstraction with timeout and admin initialization logic.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention creating a useResilientActor hook. The constraints state not to modify useActor.ts, and this appears to be a parallel alternative actor hook not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: UserProfileWithRole type with a role field is used in the profile query, replacing or extending the original UserProfile type.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request adding a role field to the user profile type. The requirements only ask for fixing the loading hang and ensuring getUserProfile returns typed errors. Introducing a role field is an unrequested data model change.
